feed.title: What If?
feed.subtitle: Let's fucking do something really interesting

entry.title: Dynamic Graph 1
entry.content:
The first paper I writen was about increase leaning (But that was a sad story). So after that I have always think about one question: Can network naturaly increase class?
So I have read many paper in class increase learning but there is one problem. It seem like everyone in this area all try to use a way to keep the information of old data than mix them with new data than make a new training of network (It called distiallation) rather than find a way to increase network itself. Of course there are some work on change the network itself but as for my review the most close way is build a new network than find a way to connect the old one and the new one.
After that I have a tiny idea: can we make a dynamic network? The network will just like a graph but it can change struct when the new class data input. I guess I will try to work on this way. So just make this article as a perface.
